title: bromus squarrosus var. normalis
intro: Bromus squarrosus var. normalis, also known as Wood Brome or Rough Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Bromus squarrosus var. normalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antiseptic, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to alleviate digestive problems like diarrhea and constipation. Herbal preparations of Bromus squarrosus var. normalis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to soothe sore throats, calm coughs, and promote overall well-being.
